title: [Q] How Can I Get All Merged Cells ?
author: SeeMeJuiner
body:
## 💬 Questions and Help

![image](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/assets/12757080/75fb6a03-572e-4a5d-8748-08d690ae41d8)
I want to get all the merged cells of an excel template at once, what do I do?

comments.author: SeeMeJuiner
comments.body:
There is an official api available for this? 
Right now I can only get all the merged cells in a sheet by getting the member variable '_merges' of the sheet, but this seems to have unofficial advantages

comments.author: Cheng-fung
